name: Terry's Dipping Sauce (Sweet & Sour)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup white vinegar, or cider or -- pepper-flavored
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the ketchup and continue heating until it begins to separate. The mixture will spatter as it heats.
3. Add the remaining ingredients: chicken broth, vinegar, sugar, cornstarch, salt, pepper, and Tabasco. Stir constantly.
4. Heat the sauce until it reaches a thick consistency similar to pudding. This prevents the sauce from dripping off when dipping egg rolls.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the optional minced scallions.
6. Transfer the sauce to a small bowl.
Makes 1 scant cup.
